heading: Prohibition on use of funds to relieve economic dislocations
label: 4653 Prohibition on use of funds to relieve economic dislocations

amendments: Amendments2021— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 116–283section 2392 of this title

Effective Date of 2021 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with additional provisions for delayed implementation and applicability of existing law, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 116–283section 1801(d) of Pub. L. 116–283section 3001 of this titleJan. 1, 2022

children.label: a
children.text: In order to help avoid the uneconomic use of Department of Defense funds in the procurement of goods and services, the Congress finds that it is necessary to prohibit the use of such funds for certain purposes.

children.label: b
children.text: No funds appropriated to or for the use of the Department of Defense may be used to pay, in connection with any contract awarded by the Department of Defense, a price differential for the purpose of relieving economic dislocations.
